theme_summary: Audit commander launch path, metaswarm gating, branch/task claim flow, and no silent downgrade behavior.

notes: All workers agree commander agent contract is well-defined (Depth Guard, 50x5=250, premium policy)
Multiple workers flagged: no runtime enforcement of banned models or 250-worker min
Docs inconsistent on branch naming (stampede/ vs havoc-swarm/)

conflicts: launcher.sh:503 claims 1600 worker cap (5×320?) but code enforces 5×250=1250
key_findings: HIGH: Silent downgrade possible - 250 workers enforced by prompt only, not launcher validation
HIGH: Banned model enforcement is prompt-level only, no hard gate
MEDIUM: --preflight --metaswarm tests wrong agent (stampede-agent not commander)
MEDIUM: No commander crash recovery / resume capability
LOW: Branch naming docs inconsistent between README and AGENTS.md
